source.citation: Teaching MS peak lists after common organic mass spectrometry tables (McLafferty-style / textbook EI patterns). Relative intensities and even some fragment assignments vary across papers and instruments — verify primary literature for research. Not vendor raw files.
source.note: Tier A teaching MS — consolidated schematic, not multi-paper consensus
